scripts.build:wasm: pnpm --filter @station-eden/web exec sh -c 'set -e; rimraf public/wasm; mkdir -p public/wasm; CARGO_TARGET_DIR=src/wasm/target cargo build --manifest-path src/wasm/Cargo.toml --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown; WASM=$(ls -1 src/wasm/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/*.wasm 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || true); if [ -z "$WASM" ]; then WASM=$(ls -1 src/wasm/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/deps/*.wasm 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || true); fi; test -n "$WASM" && wasm-bindgen --target web --no-typescript --out-dir public/wasm "$WASM" || (echo "No .wasm artifact found in src/wasm/target" >&2; exit 1)'
scripts.clean: pnpm -r run clean && rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune
